expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: Only uses neon-http driver (neon() + drizzle from drizzle-orm/neon-http). No NEXT_RUNTIME detection, no NeonPool for serverless, no pg Pool for local Docker development

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: Eager initialization: throws Error immediately if DATABASE_URL not set on import. No Proxy pattern, no deferred connection

expectations.text: casing: 'snake_case' set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: Missing from both. drizzle.config.ts has no casing field. db/index.ts drizzle() call has no casing option. This will cause column name mismatches
Used /db/ path instead (db/schema.ts, db/index.ts, db/seed.ts). Not following SE-2 service file convention
No repository layer. Created services/database/users.ts as a client-side API fetch wrapper, not a server-side repository. DB queries are inline in API routes

expectations.text: Root package.json has proxy scripts (drizzle-kit, db:seed, db:wipe)
expectations.evidence: No root-level proxy scripts added. All db scripts only in packages/nextjs/package.json

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development
expectations.evidence: No docker-compose.yml created. Assumes external Neon database only — no local development story
Uses .env.example with DATABASE_URL placeholder. References .env.local in comments. Does not use SE-2's .env.development convention
No production safety guard. Seed/wipe scripts could accidentally run against production database

expectations.text: All required dependencies in correct locations (drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, tsx, @types/pg)
expectations.evidence: Missing pg (no local driver), dotenv (can't load .env files), @types/pg, drizzle-seed. Has drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, drizzle-kit, tsx
